description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image, runs a before_script that prints the Ruby version, installs bundler without documentation, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, caching the vendor/ruby directory. Define a job named rspec that executes the command rspec. Define a job named rubocop that executes the command rubocop. Both jobs inherit the before_script and run in the default test stage with no special rules or artifacts.
